prompt:
Requested test types: Functional / E2E
Task: Confirm the environment and login selectors for this project. Keep it brief.
output:
I'll start by reading the relevant files in parallel.   All verified. Here's the brief summary:

---

## ✅ Environment & Login Selectors — `demo` Project

### Environment

| Variable | Value |
|---|---|
| `TEST_URL` | `https://the-internet.herokuapp.com` |
| `TEST_USER` | `tomsmith` |
| `TEST_PASS` | `SuperSecretPassword!` |
| `TEST_AUTH_URL` | *(empty — not applicable)* |
| `IDENTITY_PROVIDER` | *(N/A — not Azure AD)* |

> **Source:** `projects/demo/.env` ✅

---

### Authentication

This project uses a **plain HTML form** — not Azure AD / Cognito. The canonical selectors (verified in `project-memory.md §2`):

| Element | Selector |
|---|---|
| Username | `#username` |
| Password | `#password` |
| Submit | `button[type="submit"]` |
| Success signal | `.flash.success` → `/secure` |
| Error signal | `.flash.error` → stays on `/login` |

**Login flow:**
```
page.goto('/login')
page.locator('#username').fill(TEST_USER)
page.locator('#password').fill(TEST_PASS)
page.locator('button[type="submit"]').click()
→ expect URL: /secure | .flash.success visible
```

---

### Scope
- ✅ **Functional / E2E** only (as requested)
- ❌ No Figma source → no design-parity tests
- Existing specs cover: `login`, `auth`, `alerts`, `dynamic`, `files`, `form-elements`, `frames`, `homepage`, `interactions`, `navigation`, `scroll`

No changes needed — `project-memory.md` and `test-strategy.md` are already current. Ready for the **Test Planner**.
